headline: Does Xcel’s AI Infrastructure Spotlight and Clean Grid Push Reframe the Bull Case for XEL?
summary: In July 2026, Yotta 2026 released the full agenda for its Las Vegas conference on AI, energy, and digital infrastructure, highlighting Xcel Energy’s role in shaping discussions on powering AI infrastructure at scale across chips, data centers, and grid systems. At the same time, Xcel Energy has been profiled as a key US nuclear and clean energy utility with a US$60.00 billion capital program focused on carbon-free generation and grid upgrades, though this is balanced by wildfire-related...
